concerns.analysis: [Downgraded: image_count_ratio=1.00, placeholder_ratio=0.00 contradict LLM claim] The source PDF contains 10 meaningful figures showing satellite maps with different vegetation sample points and biovolumes (Figures 1-10 on pages 3-8). While the HTML output includes Figures 1, 2, 3, 4, and 10, it completely omits Figures 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9. These are meaningful data visualizations necessary for understanding the spatial distribution of the various vegetation species across different years.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Pages 5, 6, and 7 contain satellite map images for Figures 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9 (e.g., 'Figure 5. Fontinalis was detected at 65 sample points in 2018.').
concerns.output_quote: The HTML output jumps directly from Figure 4 to Figure 10, completely omitting the images and captions for Figures 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9.

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 2 table(s) with 3+ rows have no <th> header cells
